---
title : "The Sociology of Science: Theoretical and Empirical Investigations"
date : "1973-01-01"
author : ["Robert King Merton"]
categories : ["Book"]
publication : " . Chicago: University of Chicago Press. ISBN: 978-0-226-52091-9"
publication_short : " . Chicago: University of Chicago Press. ISBN: 978-0-226-52091-9"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Robert King Merton (1973). *The Sociology of Science: Theoretical and Empirical Investigations*.  . Chicago: University of Chicago Press. ISBN: 978-0-226-52091-9

:::
